name: Chilli Con Carne English
recipeIngredient: 6 ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped OR
1 pinch cayenne pepper, or to taste
salt and freshly ground pepper - to taste
1/2 lb kidney beans cooked with 2 Tbs brown sugar (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in 2 tbsp of the hot oils (canola and olive), it will release liquid before it browns. This should take about half an hour. Set aside.
2. In another pan, cook onions in 2 tbsp of the oil until they start to change color. Stir in bell pepper and cook until soft.
3. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Stir in cumin, oregano, peppers, chilis, and thyme. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Stir in browned beef, season with salt and pepper.
6. Pour beer and cook until foam disappears.
7. Stir in tomatoes and sugar, bring to a boil, and simmer uncovered for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
8. Sprinkle the corn meal and stir well. Cover pan and simmer for 2 hours. Stir a few times.
9. Add beans and some of the liquid they were cooked in. Cook for 10 minutes.
10. Check seasonings.
Serve topped with chopped green onions.
